startup_message: Welcome to Spankbang Video Downloader! System initialized and ready to download
failure_message: Web content fetch failed! Status code: {}
download_prompt: Do you want to download {} (this video) [y/n]:
video_not_found: Video information not found in the web content
retry_message: Please close and reopen to download the video
already_downloading_message: A download is already in progress. Please wait for it to finish or cancel it before starting a new one
no_download_message: There is no download in progress
help_message:
1. Enter Spankbang video URL
2. Click Download
3. Wait for the download to complete
